lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Welcome to the Sophanem Bank! Anything I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: And what can the Sophanem Bank do for you today?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you with the Bank of Gielinor?

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: We have an agreement with them, yes. It took some time to work out.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: As you may have noticed, the desert adds complications to all matters of trade and finance.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Was there something else you wanted?

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: It could be better. The businesses here are still recovering from recent events. Personal banking like yours makes up the majority of our trade.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Was there anything else with which I can help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to buy more bank slots.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Why? You don't use the bank.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: I can sell you up to [number] additional bank slots in sets of 40. How many are you interested in buying?

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Buying [number] additional bank slots will cost [number] coins. Be warned, this purchase is not reversible. Are you happy to proceed?

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Your additional bank slots have been added.
